properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Keep on making a way Over and over again.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You're always bringing me out Over and over again.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, You've done so much, All to You I owe…

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will ever sing Your praise, Glory to Your name, Keep on making a way for me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Keep on making a way for me, Opening doors for me, Taking care of me.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Keep on, Keep on making a way for me, Opening doors for me, Taking care of me.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I will ever sing Your praise, Glory to Your name, Keep on making a way for me.
